docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-09-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-20-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, D'ARTANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRISON, ANDREA $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00, HEARD WITH CASE #788861. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-08-2001, GRANTED
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-20-2001, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, D'ARTANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT MORRISON, ANDREA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, D'ARTANIEL HEARING SET FOR MAR-20-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MORRISON, ANDREA HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, D'ARTANIEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORRISON, ANDREA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, D'ARTANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRISON, ANDREA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00, HEARD WITH CASES # 788861 & # 790530. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MORRISON, ANDREA
DEFENDANT'S FEE WAIVER APPROVED AND FILED. DEFENDANT'S CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED.
THE APPEAL IS VOID AND MOTION TO VACATE FILED BY THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT.
